name: N,N,N-Trimethyl-2-(phosphonooxy)ethanaminium
description: Calcium and magnesium salts used therapeutically in hepatobiliary dysfunction.

interactions.name: Acemetacin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Acemetacin can be decreased when used in combination with N,N,N-Trimethyl-2-(phosphonooxy)ethanaminium.
